text:
name: Agentic Analyzer Parity (Nightly)

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: "20 6 * * *"
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      category:
        description: Category passed to both production and mirror runs
        required: false
        default: full
        type: string
      max_fixtures:
        description: Max fixtures to run (0 = all)
        required: false
        default: "3"
        type: string

jobs:
  parity_gate:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    env:
      OPENAI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.OPENAI_API_KEY }}
      PYTHONUNBUFFERED: "1"

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.12"

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pip install -r requirements.txt

      - name: Validate API key
        run: |
          if [ -z "$OPENAI_API_KEY" ]; then
            echo "OPENAI_API_KEY secret is required for parity gate runs."
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Check parity fixtures/configs
        id: parity_inputs
        run: |
          if [ ! -d "docs/agent_tests/fixtures" ]; then
            echo "docs/agent_tests/fixtures is missing; skipping parity gate."
            echo "should_run=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            exit 0
          fi
          if ! ls docs/agent_tests/fixtures/*/manifest.json >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            echo "No fixture manifests found; skipping parity gate."
            echo "should_run=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            exit 0
          fi
          if [ ! -f "docs/agent_tests/configs/production_baseline.json" ] || [ ! -f "docs/agent_tests/configs/production_mirror_strict.json" ]; then
            echo "Required parity configs are missing; skipping parity gate."
            echo "should_run=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            exit 0
          fi
          echo "should_run=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Run parity gate
        if: steps.parity_inputs.outputs.should_run == 'true'
        run: |
          CATEGORY="${{ github.event.inputs.category }}"
          if [ -z "$CATEGORY" ]; then CATEGORY="full"; fi
          MAX_FIXTURES="${{ github.event.inputs.max_fixtures }}"
          if [ -z "$MAX_FIXTURES" ]; then MAX_FIXTURES="3"; fi

          python scripts/agentic_testsuite_parity_gate.py \
            --fixtures-root docs/agent_tests/fixtures \
            --category "$CATEGORY" \
            --max-fixtures "$MAX_FIXTURES" \
            --production-config docs/agent_tests/configs/production_baseline.json \
            --mirror-config docs/agent_tests/configs/production_mirror_strict.json \
            --max-borrower-total-delta 1.0 \
            --max-issue-key-diff 1 \
            --min-issue-jaccard 0.8 \
            --max-need-key-diff 2 \
            --min-need-jaccard 0.7

      - name: Upload parity artifacts
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: parity-artifacts-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: docs/agent_tests/runs/parity_*
          if-no-files-found: warn
